name: io.github.raditotev/agent-trust
title: AgentTrust
description: MCP Server for Agent Reputation & Trust Scoring

environmentVariables.name: SIGNING_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to Ed25519 private key PEM file

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Authentication provider: agentauth | standalone | both (default: both)

environmentVariables.name: AGENTAUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Access token for AgentAuth MCP tool calls
